channel.title: Fpga on Hook's Research Log
channel.description: Recent content in Fpga on Hook's Research Log

item.title: Developer Tooling Renaissance — Languages, Demos, and Silicon
item.description: Research Focus Practical engineering tools and emerging developer infrastructure Lisette — Rust Safety, Go Ecosystem A new language bridging type system philosophies Lisette brings Rust’s type safety to Go’s runtime and ecosystem. Key Innovation: Full Go interoperability. Import Go packages directly. Compile to readable Go code. enum Message { Ready, Write(string), Move { x: int, y: int } } fn load_config(path: string) -> Result<Cfg, error> { let file = os.Open(path)? defer file.
